query: SELECT positionCode, COUNT(*) as total_questions FROM performance_evaluation_items WHERE positionCode != 'UNKNOWN' GROUP BY positionCode ORDER BY positionCode;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46m8FvVm7HSsc1z.root --database 6XmnMHSGkmqmcvGw6sxZ3M --execute SELECT positionCode, COUNT(*) as total_questions FROM performance_evaluation_items WHERE positionCode != 'UNKNOWN' GROUP BY positionCode ORDER BY positionCode;
